log: Game initialized with 39 cards in deck, 5 in market, tracker at 0/10.
T1 Rockefeller: Auctioned Orange hype (stock-15). R $7, M pass (max $6), V pass. Rockefeller wins at $7. Cash: $18. Hype: Orange -> $6.
Market refill: Orange blank (stock-9)
T2 Morgan: Auctioned Purple hype (stock-31). M $7, V $11, R pass, M pass. Vanderbilt wins at $11. Cash: $14. Hype: Purple -> $6.
Market refill: Blue insider (stock-8)
T3 Vanderbilt: Auctioned Blue insider (stock-8). V $6->$10->pass, R $8->$11, M $9->pass. Rockefeller wins at $11. Cash: $7.
Market refill: Yellow stock_down (stock-22)
T4 Rockefeller: Played Insider Tip (itip-49) Blue +2/Orange +1. Blue -> $7, Orange -> $7. Tracker: 1/10.
T5 Morgan: Auctioned Yellow blank (stock-18). M $6, V pass, R pass. Morgan wins at $6. Cash: $19.
Market refill: Purple blank (stock-28)
T6 Vanderbilt: Auctioned Purple blank (stock-28). V $7->$9->$11, R pass, M $8->$10->pass. Vanderbilt wins at $11. Cash: $3.
Market refill: Yellow blank (stock-19)
T7 Rockefeller: Sold Blue insider (stock-8) for $7. Cash: $14. Insider ability: drew Yellow +2 / Purple -1 (itip-55).
T8 Morgan: Auctioned Yellow stock_down (stock-22). M $6->$9, V pass, R $7->pass. Morgan wins at $9. Cash: $10. stock_down: Purple -> $5.
Market refill: Blue blank (stock-4)
T9 Vanderbilt: Claimed 2 Purple goal (goal-62). Reward: steal $1 from Rockefeller. V cash: $4, R cash: $13. Tracker: 2/10.
T10 Rockefeller: Auctioned Orange blank (stock-9). R $7->$9, M $8->pass, V pass. Rockefeller wins at $9. Cash: $4.
Market refill: Orange blank (stock-12)
T11 Morgan: Claimed 2 Yellow goal (goal-61). Reward: set Orange to $5 (was $7). Tracker: 3/10.
T12 Vanderbilt: Played Insider Tip (itip-52) Purple +2/Blue +1. Purple -> $7, Blue -> $8. Tracker: 4/10.
T13 Rockefeller: Played Insider Tip (itip-50) Orange +2/Yellow +1. Orange -> $7, Yellow -> $6. Tracker: 5/10.
T14 Morgan: Played Insider Tip (itip-48) Purple -3. Purple -> $4. Tracker: 6/10.
T15 Vanderbilt: Played Insider Tip (itip-58) Yellow -2/Purple +1. Yellow -> $4, Purple -> $5. Tracker: 7/10.
T16 Rockefeller: Auctioned Hostile Takeover (action-41). R $1->$4, M $2->pass, V $3->pass. Rockefeller wins at $4. Cash: $0. Card goes to hand.
Market refill: Tipster's Choice (action-33)
T17 Morgan: Auctioned Yellow blank (stock-19). M $1, V pass, R $0 (cant bid). Morgan wins at $1. Cash: $9. Now has 3 Yellow!
Market refill: Purple stock_up (stock-29)
T18 Vanderbilt: Auctioned Purple stock_up (stock-29). V $4, R cant bid, M $5. Morgan wins at $5. Cash: $4. stock_up: Yellow -> $5.
Market refill: Yellow insider (stock-24)
T19 Rockefeller: Played Hostile Takeover on Morgan. Stole Yellow blank (stock-18). Morgan receives $5 from bank. R now has 2 Orange + 1 Yellow. Morgan has 2 Yellow + 1 Purple.
T20 Morgan: Played Insider Tip (itip-51) Yellow +2/Purple +1. Yellow -> $7, Purple -> $6. Tracker: 8/10.
T21 Vanderbilt: Auctioned Blue blank (stock-4). V $1->$4, R cant bid, M $2->pass. Vanderbilt wins at $4. Cash: $0.
Market refill: Corner the Market (action-34)
T22 Rockefeller: Sold Yellow blank (stock-18) for $7. Cash: $7. Keeps 2 Orange.
T23 Morgan: PASS. Protecting $29 lead with tracker at 8/10.
T24 Vanderbilt: Sold Blue blank (stock-4) for $8. Cash: $8. Keeps 2 Purple.
T25 Rockefeller: Auctioned Orange blank (stock-12). R $4, M pass, V $3->pass. Rockefeller wins at $4. Cash: $3.
Market refill: Wild Speculation (action-38)
T26 Morgan: Auctioned Yellow insider (stock-24). M $3->$7, V $5->pass, R pass ($3 cant beat $5). Morgan wins at $7. Cash: $2. Now has 3 Yellow + 1 Purple.
Market refill: Connected Broker (action-36)
T27 Vanderbilt: Auctioned Rumor Mill (action-42). V $1->$4, R $3->cant beat $4, M pass ($2 max). Vanderbilt wins at $4. Cash: $4. Card goes to hand.
Market refill: Purple blank (stock-26)
T28 Rockefeller: Auctioned Purple blank (stock-26). R $1, M pass, V $2, R pass. Vanderbilt wins at $2. Cash: $2.
Market refill: Orange blank (stock-10)
T29 Morgan: Claimed 3 Yellow goal (goal-65). Reward: drew Purple blank (stock-27). Tracker: 9/10. Morgan wealth: $35.
T30 Vanderbilt: Played Rumor Mill (action-42) with -1 to all stocks. Blue $8->$7, Orange $7->$6, Yellow $7->$6, Purple $6->$5. Tracker stays 9/10.
T31 Rockefeller: Auctioned Orange blank (stock-10). R $1->$3, M $2->cant beat $3, V pass. Rockefeller wins at $3. Cash: $0. Now has 4 Orange.
Market refill: Blue stock_down (stock-6)
T32 Morgan: PASS. Protecting $30 lead with tracker at 9/10.
T33 Vanderbilt: PASS. No profitable action available.
T34 Rockefeller: PASS. All three players passing — stalemate at 9/10.

T35 STALEMATE RESOLUTION: All players passing indefinitely. Crisis card on top of deck means any auction ends game. Rockefeller's insider tip also ends game. Forcing resolution — Rockefeller auctions Blue stock_down (stock-6), no bids ($0 pass all), Rockefeller gets it free. Market refill reveals crisis card (crisis-43) -> tracker 10/10. GAME OVER.
FINAL SCORES: Morgan $30 (WINNER), Rockefeller $24, Vanderbilt $17
